display_name: 管流湍流临界振幅指数 γ（前沿辅助）
benchmark_scope: Derive the critical perturbation amplitude scaling epsilon_c(Re) ~ Re^{-gamma} for subcritical transition in Hagen-Poiseuille pipe flow from the incompressible NSE, obtaining the exact value of gamma without empirical input. Linear stability predicts no transition at all; the challenge is to derive the nonlinear threshold from energy balance.
planning_constraints: Frontier transition and transient-growth results may be used as seeds, but you must state exactly which scaling step remains nontrivial.
Do not treat any proposed value of gamma as settled merely because a partial asymptotic argument suggests it.
Turn imported frontier scalings into explicit bridge propositions describing the remaining derivation gap.
